known_gaps: External guideline artifacts are not cached or license-verified.
Clinical and safety review is incomplete.
Simulation set is below release coverage requirements.

cough.chest_pain_nrs.wording: [필수] 기침과 관련된 흉통이 있었다면 가장 심할 때 통증을 0부터 10까지 숫자로 알려주세요.

cough.chest_pain_site_character_duration.wording: 흉통이 있다면 부위·양상·지속시간, 퍼지는 곳과 기침·호흡·움직임과의 관계를 알려주세요.

cough.child_age_feeding_sleep_breathing_.wording: 소아라면 나이·체중, 수유/식사·수면·호흡·활동·성장 변화와 보호자가 직접 본 기침 양상을 알려주세요.

cough.communication_language_hearing_lit.wording: 선호 언어, 통역·청각·시각·문해·디지털 지원 등 문진과 진료에 필요한 도움이 있나요?

cough.daily_frequency_episode_duration_b.wording: 하루 기침 횟수나 심한 발작 횟수, 한 번 시작하면 지속되는 시간과 발작 사이에는 정상으로 돌아오는지 알려주세요.

cough.day_night_sleep_posture_voice_laug.wording: 낮·밤·수면 중, 눕기, 말하기·웃기, 식사 전후 중 언제 심해지거나 좋아지는지 알려주세요.

cough.dyspnea_rest_exertion_speech_sleep.wording: 숨참이 있다면 안정·운동·말하기·수면 영향, 산소포화도 측정값·기기·시각과 회복 과정을 알려주세요.

cough.eating_drinking_swallowing_choking.wording: 음식·물·침을 삼킬 때 기침·사레가 들거나 걸리는 느낌, 구토·흡인 우려와 시작 시점을 알려주세요.

cough.exercise_cold_air_speech_laugh_fum.wording: 운동·찬 공기·말하기·웃기·연기·향·먼지 중 유발 요인과 노출 후 시작시간·회복시간을 알려주세요.

cough.fever_temperature_chills_systemic_.wording: 발열이 있다면 최고 체온·측정방법·시각, 오한·몸살·전신 상태와 기침 전후 순서를 알려주세요.

cough.first_latest_onset_exact_time_cont.wording: 처음과 가장 최근 기침의 날짜·시각, 당시 하던 일과 이후 좋아짐·악화·반복 양상을 알려주세요.

cough.hemoptysis_amount_frequency_appear.wording: 피가 보였다면 줄무늬·덩어리 등 모양, 대략적인 양·횟수와 기침 가래에서 나온 것이 확실한지 알려주세요.

cough.home_work_hobby_mold_dust_fume_ani.wording: 집·직장·취미의 곰팡이·분진·가스·화학물질·동물·계절 노출, 보호구와 쉬는 날 증상 변화를 알려주세요.

cough.infectious_contact_travel_tb_setti.wording: 기침 환자 접촉, 집단생활·의료·교정시설·해외 체류와 결핵 노출·검사 이력 및 증상과의 시점을 알려주세요.

cough.information_source_witness_record_.wording: 본인·보호자 중 누가 답하는지, 일지·사진·기기·의무기록 유무와 기억이 불확실하거나 자료가 서로 다른 부분을 알려주세요.

cough.medicine_name_dose_start_change_ac.wording: 처방약·감기약·흡입제의 이름·용량·시작/변경일, 복용 여부와 기침 시작 시점의 관계를 알려주세요.

cough.older_frailty_swallowing_polypharm.wording: 고령자라면 허약·삼킴/사레·인지·이동 상태, 복용약 수와 식사·복약을 돕는 사람이 있는지 알려주세요.

cough.paroxysm_whoop_posttussive_vomit_a.wording: 연속 발작, 숨 들이쉴 때 소리, 기침 뒤 구토·청색증·탈진이 있는지와 회복까지 걸리는 시간을 알려주세요.

cough.patient_goal_expectation_additiona.wording: 진료에서 확인하고 싶은 내용, 질문에 없던 의견과 별도로 문진받고 싶은 다른 방문 이유가 있나요?

cough.patient_words_dry_productive_and_m.wording: 본인의 표현으로 기침 소리·느낌과 마른기침인지 가래가 나오는지, 가장 불편하거나 걱정되는 점을 알려주세요.

cough.pregnancy_age_frailty_comorbidity_.wording: 해당되는 경우 임신·산후 기간, 소아·고령·허약 상태와 심폐·신장·간·당뇨 등 합병증 위험 병력을 알려주세요.

cough.primary_context.wording: 현재 급성 기침, 감염 후·아급성, 만성·반복, 가래·반복 감염, 유발·노출 관련, 약물 관련, 소아·보호자 응답, 추적·결과 확인, 또는 불분명 중 가장 가까운 상황은 무엇인가요?

cough.prior_blood_sputum_swab_allergy_tb.wording: 혈액·가래·호흡기 검체, 알레르기·결핵 검사의 날짜·결과·추세와 아직 확인하지 못한 항목을 알려주세요.

cough.prior_chest_xray_ct_spirometry_fen.wording: 흉부 X-ray/CT, 폐기능·기관지확장·FeNO 검사의 날짜·설명받은 결과, 검사 당시 증상과 자료 출처를 알려주세요.

cough.prior_recurrent_episode_ed_admissi.wording: 이전 유사 기침의 시기·진단·응급실/입원 여부, 평소 상태로 회복했는지와 이번과 다른 점을 알려주세요.

cough.rapid_or_significant_worsening.wording: 기침이나 전신 상태가 최근 빠르게 또는 뚜렷하게 악화하고 있나요?

cough.respiratory_cardiac_reflux_ent_imm.wording: 천식·COPD·기관지확장증·폐렴·결핵, 심장·역류·비염/부비동·면역저하·암 병력의 진단 시기와 현재 상태를 알려주세요.

cough.sleep_work_school_voice_eating_act.wording: 수면·출근/등교·말하기·식사·운동·자가관리와 가족 돌봄에 미치는 제한을 알려주세요.

cough.smoking_vaping_cannabis_pack_years.wording: 담배·전자담배·가열담배·대마 등 흡입 노출의 종류, 하루 양·기간·마지막 사용과 최근 변화를 알려주세요.

cough.sputum_amount_colour_consistency_o.wording: 가래가 있다면 하루 양, 색·점도·냄새와 평소보다 달라진 시점을 알려주세요.

cough.treatment_antibiotic_inhaler_antac.wording: 항생제·흡입제·위산/알레르기 약·기침약 등 사용한 치료의 이름·기간·반응·부작용과 중단 후 변화를 알려주세요.

cough.upper_airway_symptom_sequence_and_.wording: 콧물·코막힘·재채기·목통증·후비루·목 가다듬기가 있다면 시작 순서와 평소 알레르기·비염 상태를 알려주세요.

cough.vaccination_influenza_covid_pertus.wording: 독감·COVID-19·백일해 등 관련 예방접종 여부와 가능한 최근 접종일을 알려주세요.

cough.wheeze_chest_tightness_variability.wording: 쌕쌕거림·가슴 답답함이 있다면 시간대·운동·감염과의 관계, 변동성과 이전에도 같은 양상이 있었는지 알려주세요.

exposure.occupational_irritant.wording: At work, are you exposed to dust, fumes, smoke, chemicals, or other things that irritate your breathing?

exposure.sick_contact.wording: Has anyone around you recently had a cold or similar symptoms?

exposure.tuberculosis_risk.wording: Have you had close contact with tuberculosis or another reason you may have been exposed to TB?

history.recurrent_respiratory_infections.wording: Have you had repeated chest or sinus infections?

medication.ace_inhibitor_exposure.wording: Are you taking a blood pressure or heart medicine called an ACE inhibitor?

pain.frequency.wording: [필수] 최근 평가 대상 기간 동안 통증은 얼마나 자주 있었나요? 1 통증 없음, 2 통증이 있으나 매일은 아님, 3 매일 통증이 있음

patient.immunocompromised.wording: Do you have a condition or take a treatment that weakens your immune system?

patient.smoking.status.wording: Do you currently smoke, did you smoke in the past, or have you never smoked?

symptom.chest_pain.wording: Have you had any chest pain or discomfort?

symptom.cough_after_meals.wording: Does the cough tend to start or get worse after meals?

symptom.cough_cold_air_trigger.wording: Does cold air trigger or worsen the cough?

symptom.cough_exercise_trigger.wording: Does exercise or physical activity trigger or worsen the cough?

symptom.cough_lying_down.wording: Does the cough get worse when you lie down?

symptom.cough_nocturnal.wording: Does the cough wake you at night or tend to be worse overnight?

symptom.cough_paroxysmal.wording: Do you get prolonged or repeated fits of coughing?

symptom.cough_sudden_onset.wording: Did the cough begin very suddenly, for example during eating or after something went down the wrong way?

symptom.cough_trajectory.wording: Overall, is the cough improving, staying about the same, or getting worse?

symptom.cough_whoop.wording: After a coughing fit, do you make a whooping sound when breathing in?

symptom.duration.wording: How long have you had the cough?

symptom.dysphagia.wording: Have you had persistent or worsening difficulty swallowing?

symptom.dysphonia_persistent.wording: Has your voice been persistently hoarse or changed when you speak?

symptom.dyspnea.wording: Have you felt short of breath or had trouble breathing?

symptom.fever.wording: Have you had a fever or felt feverish?

symptom.heartburn.wording: Do you get a burning feeling in your chest or upper stomach?

symptom.hemoptysis.wording: Have you noticed any blood when you cough?

symptom.night_sweats.wording: Have you been having drenching or unusual night sweats?

symptom.onset.wording: When did the cough first start?

symptom.postnasal_drip.wording: Do you feel mucus draining into your throat or need to clear your throat often?

symptom.regurgitation.wording: Do you notice sour or bitter fluid coming back into your throat or mouth?

symptom.rhinorrhea.wording: Have you had a runny or blocked nose?

symptom.sneezing.wording: Have you been sneezing more than usual?

symptom.sore_throat.wording: Have you had a sore or scratchy throat?

symptom.sputum.wording: Are you bringing up any phlegm or mucus when you cough?

symptom.systemic_unwellness.wording: Apart from the cough, how unwell do you feel overall?

symptom.unintentional_weight_loss.wording: Have you lost weight without trying?

symptom.wheeze.wording: Have you noticed any wheezing or a whistling sound when breathing?

elements.limitation: Clinical sex used for interview routing is not automatically equivalent to every USCDI sex-related element.

elements.data_element: Medication, Dose, Dose Unit, Indication and Dispense Status
Blood Pressure, Heart Rate, Respiratory Rate, Temperature and Pulse Oximetry
Laboratory Test, Result, Result Status and Specimen
Clinical Test and Result or Report
Patient Goals and Care Experience Preference
Encounter Type, Time, Location and Disposition
Care Team Member Identity, Role and Contact
Medication, Laboratory, Imaging and Clinical Test Orders
History and Physical or Progress Note

limitations: Coverage indicates candidate data-population capability, not US certification or conformance.
A mapped Fact does not make the data element clinically required for this encounter.
US-specific vocabularies and regulatory semantics do not replace Korean bindings or policy.

elements.display: Patient concern, goal and expected outcome
Pain presence and NRS score when pain applies
Patient, proxy or record information source

nodes.display: Cough Frequency Bout Duration and Inter-episode State

Home Work and Environmental Exposure Detail

Pregnancy Age Frailty and Risk Context

Smoking Vaping and Inhaled Exposure Detail

guideline_behavior.rationale: Interview behavior derived from guidelines may change with recommendations.

local_jurisdiction.rationale: Local pathways and administrative rules may change quickly.

safety_critical.rationale: Safety behavior and escalation knowledge require frequent monitoring.

stable_semantic.rationale: Atomic patient-reportable concepts are relatively stable but still require periodic review.

terminology_mapping.rationale: Terminology and interoperability baselines have independent releases.

clinical_guideline.rationale: Daily automated monitoring provides early detection for high-impact guideline changes; full review occurs only when change is detected or the review date is reached.

interoperability_standard.rationale: Versioned interoperability standards and domain datasets are monitored weekly; detected changes trigger mapping and Coverage review without changing clinical rules.

nice_guidance.rationale: NICE guidance is versioned and may be amended; weekly monitoring detects changes without implying weekly clinical re-review.

public_health_guidance.rationale: Public-health pages can change between formal releases; weekly monitoring is appropriate for the research package.

terminology_server.rationale: Terminology servers publish versioned content; monthly baseline monitoring balances stability and acquisition cost.

assertions: Common-cold symptom cluster may include runny or congested nose, cough, sneezing, sore throat, headache, mild body aches and usually low-grade fever in older children and adults.
artifacts.title: About Common Cold

assertions: Acute cough is commonly self-limiting and often related to viral upper-respiratory infection.
Rapid or significant worsening, systemic severe illness, or signs of serious illness require reassessment or referral.
Immunosuppression and significant comorbidity can increase complication risk.
artifacts.title: Cough (acute): antimicrobial prescribing

assertions: Chronic-cough history should cover onset, time course, nature, associated symptoms, triggers, day/night variation and irritant exposure.
Assessment should consider ACE-inhibitor exposure and common treatable traits while preserving uncertainty.
Potential warning features include chest pain, dyspnea, hemoptysis, recurrent infection, immunodeficiency and tuberculosis exposure risk.
notes: The official ERS page still identifies ERJ 2020;55:1901136 and links the published correction; no newer replacement guideline was identified during this metadata check.
artifacts.title: ERS guidelines on diagnosis and treatment of chronic cough in adults and children

assertions: Persistent cough can be the only reported respiratory symptom of cough-variant asthma, but alternative causes must remain distinct considerations.
Cough-variant asthma patterns may be worse at night or with exercise; normal spirometry does not by itself resolve the differential.

Common alternative contexts for isolated non-productive cough include upper-airway cough syndrome, ACE-inhibitor exposure, reflux, chronic sinusitis, post-infectious cough, inducible laryngeal obstruction and eosinophilic bronchitis.
notes: The 2026 full Strategy Report supersedes the previously monitored 2025 Summary Guide for these cough assertions.
The source PDF was inspected transiently and is not cached in the repository.
artifacts.title: 2026 GINA Strategy Report

assertions: Chronic-cough history should identify underlying disease, treatable traits and referral red flags.
Productive cough, recurrent infection, hemoptysis and malignancy-related warning features require targeted assessment rather than diagnostic assumption.
artifacts.title: British Thoracic Society Clinical Statement on chronic cough in adults

limitations: Only source metadata and narrowly paraphrased assertions are stored; full source artifacts are not cached.
Licensing and clinical interpretation require review.
The knowledge derived from this manifest is restricted to research and simulation.
External guideline sources have not yet been cached or license-verified.
Full source artifacts are not cached.
Licensing and clinical interpretation remain unreviewed.
